# Zelo Flooring

> Family-run flooring installation contractor in San Diego, CA. Carpet, luxury vinyl plank (LVP), hardwood, laminate, tile, cork, rubber, and VCT installation for residential and commercial properties throughout San Diego County.

Family-run, with over a decade of flooring installation experience (in the trade since 2013). Licensed, bonded, and insured (CSLB Lic #1083572). Free in-home estimates with real samples. Serving San Diego, La Jolla, Coronado, Del Mar, Carlsbad, Encinitas, Poway, Vista, Rancho Santa Fe, San Marcos, and Oceanside.

## Service pages

- [Carpet Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/carpet-flooring-san-diego): Plush, frieze, berber, and patterned carpet from Shaw, Mohawk, and Stanton. Power-stretched installs.
- [Vinyl Plank Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/vinyl-flooring-san-diego): Waterproof luxury vinyl plank (LVP) and rigid-core SPC from Shaw, Mohawk, COREtec, and Mannington.
- [Hardwood Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/hardwood-flooring-san-diego): Solid and engineered hardwood. Oak, maple, hickory, walnut. NWFA-spec installation.
- [Laminate Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/laminate-flooring-san-diego): Pergo and Mohawk RevWood laminate with proper underlayment and expansion gaps.
- [Tile Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/tile-flooring-san-diego): Porcelain, ceramic, and natural stone tile for bathrooms, kitchens, mudrooms, and entryways.
- [Cork Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/cork-flooring-san-diego): Sustainable Wicanders and APC cork. Glue-down and floating installations.
- [Rubber Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/rubber-flooring-san-diego): Rolled, tile, and interlocking rubber for home gyms, garages, and commercial spaces.
- [VCT Flooring Installation San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/vinyl-composition-tile-flooring-san-diego): Armstrong and Mannington vinyl composition tile for schools, healthcare, retail.

## Service areas (city pages)

- [Flooring in San Diego](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-san-diego): Main San Diego County flooring service. Slab-first installs, coastal-spec materials.
- [Flooring in La Jolla](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-la-jolla): Coastal and hillside homes. Engineered hardwood and rigid-core vinyl for salt-air humidity.
- [Flooring in Carlsbad](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-carlsbad): Village cottages and master-planned slab homes in La Costa, Aviara, Bressi Ranch.
- [Flooring in Encinitas](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-encinitas): Beach homes and rentals in Leucadia, Cardiff, and Olivenhain.
- [Flooring in Poway](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-poway): Inland homes and larger lots. Solid hardwood friendly climate.
- [Flooring in Del Mar](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-del-mar): Beachfront and bluff homes. Engineered wood, large-format tile, second-home moisture strategy.
- [Flooring in Vista](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-vista): Value-focused inland homes. Durable vinyl plank and laminate.
- [Flooring in Rancho Santa Fe](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-rancho-santa-fe): Estate-scale installs with flat-substrate prep for wide-plank and large-format tile.
- [Flooring in Coronado](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-coronado): Salt-air, historic, and military homes. Moisture-stable materials.
- [Flooring in San Marcos](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-san-marcos): Hillside, slab, and rental homes inland in North County.
- [Flooring in Oceanside](https://www.zeloflooring.com/flooring-oceanside): Coastal and inland homes, including military and rental properties.

## Blog (guides and how-tos)

- [Best Flooring for San Diego Homes](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/best-flooring-for-san-diego-homes): Best picks for slab foundations and coastal humidity, by goal, area, room, and budget.
- [Can You Install Laminate Over Existing Floors?](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/laminate-over-existing-floors): Surface-by-surface guide to floating laminate over tile, vinyl, hardwood, concrete, and more.
- [Laminate Flooring Thickness and Wear Layers Explained](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/laminate-flooring-thickness): mm thickness vs AC wear rating, and which to choose by room.
- [How Long Does Hardwood Floor Refinishing Take?](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/how-long-does-hardwood-refinishing-take): Day-by-day timeline, cure times, and water vs oil finish.
- [Cost to Install Carpet (2026)](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/cost-to-install-carpet): $3-$8 per sq ft installed. Cost by carpet type, room size, labor, and stairs.
- [LVP vs Hardwood](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/lvp-vs-hardwood): Cost, durability, water resistance, and resale value compared.
- [Best Carpet for Living Room](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/best-carpet-for-living-room): Fiber, style, and color guide.
- [Best Flooring for Pets](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/best-flooring-for-pets): Scratch-proof and waterproof options compared.
- [Polyester vs Nylon Carpet](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/polyester-vs-nylon-carpet): Durability, stain resistance, cost.
- [Engineered vs Solid Hardwood](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/engineered-vs-solid-hardwood): When to choose each.
- [Vinyl Plank Flooring Cost (2026)](https://www.zeloflooring.com/blog/vinyl-plank-flooring-cost): LVP installation pricing breakdown.
